heading_content_part: User Data Policy for the Software Update FeatureTo identify apps with pending updates, the software update feature fetches the package                                names of all apps on the users device and puts them on our servers. This data is                                completely encrypted and secure. We do not share this data with any third-party in no                                shape or form. The information which we collectWe only collect some harmless personal data to serve you                                in a better way.

Private InformationWith our apps, we do not collect any personal                                information such as name, physical address, email addresses, phone numbers, or SSN                                stored within your device.
How to contact usFor questions or comments related to our privacy policy                                or our privacy practices, please contact us atfeedback@quantum4u.in.

CHANGES TO OUR PRIVACY POLICYPlease review this policy periodically as we will post                                any changes to our privacy policy here. After any changes or updates to our privacy                                policy, we will try to notify you in other ways too. You can immediately stop all                                services in case you do not agree to any changes to our policies.
Limited LiabilityBy using our apps, you accept the fact that Quantum4U is                                not liable for any untoward circumstances that may arise from the use of our apps.
Support for free versionWe always try to fix all application issues with time.                                Still, some of our apps(

Auto Call Recorder) could be dealing with hardware issues that                                we have no control over and will not be able to fix. In case you change devices, the                                data & settings on your old phone application will not be carried over to your new                                device automatically. You will need to reconfigure them manually.Auto Call Recorder● Auto Call Recorder app will not be able to

record any calls made via Wi-FI, VOIP, SIP, or any other kind of internet calls.● All your call recordings will be saved within your device. The app also comes                                with a backup & restore feature where you can take backups of all your recordings and                                upload the same to the cloud.

THIRD-PARTY SUPPLIERS● With our apps, we aim to able to deliver optimum                                services to you. To enhance the feature set of our apps, we happen to use a few                                third-party suppliers, with whom we exchange data. One of these partners is Appvestor.                                Click on the link below to read Appvestor's Privacy Policy.https://legal.calldorado.com/privacy-policy

Data Collection & Privacy for  AddressXThis page is used to inform users regarding our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of Personal Information if anyone decides to use our Service.

What is Personal Information?"Personal Information" refers to any information that relates to a person, which, either directly or indirectly, in combination with other information available or likely to be available with any person, is capable of identifying such person, including but not limited to the following and any copies thereof:Your informationany specific details about you using/accessing this applicationyour IP address andCall/chat data records, if any

decoder_heading: What information does the AddressX collect?
ident_heading: What information does the AddressX collect?
heading_content_part: What information does the AddressX collect?Location PermissionThe AddressX app requires you to find your current location. The current location of users is needed for tracking & navigation purposes as this app is primarily a location finding & routing app.Contact PermissionWe require contact permission to fetch the list of contacts registered on your device. We also store this data on our servers. However, this data is secure and is not shared with any third party in any shape or form.

decoder_heading: How will the AddressX use your Personal Information
ident_heading: How will the AddressX use your Personal Information
heading_content_part: How will the AddressX use your Personal InformationThe AddressX uses your Personal Information for any of the following (but not limited to):Notify other users about User activities.The AddressX may use your Personal Information to understand your user behavior better while using the app.

decoder_heading: How will the AddressX share your Personal Information?
ident_heading: How will the AddressX share your Personal Information?
heading_content_part: How will the AddressX share your Personal Information?Your Personal Information to enable a person to reach your location.The AddressX does not provide your Personal Information to third parties for their marketing purposes without your consent.

decoder_heading: How does the AddressX store your Personal Information?
ident_heading: How does the AddressX store your Personal Information?
heading_content_part: How does the AddressX store your Personal Information?AddressX stores and processes Personal Information on computers that are protected by physical as well as technological security devices. Of course, data transmission over the internet is inherently insecure, and the AddressX does not warrant/guarantee the security of data sent over the internet.Copyright © 2023Quantum4U Labs Pvt.
